description_long: This is a large, detached suburban house surrounded by a fenced yard and landscaped with trees and bushes. The front features a double garage with two cars, a prominent entryway with a covered porch, and multiple gabled rooflines. The rear of the house opens to a spacious backyard with a patio area and a small pool, while the sides are bordered by hedges and additional greenery. The house has numerous large windows arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, providing ample natural light. The roof is primarily gabled with intersecting sections, and the exterior appears to be finished in a combination of painted siding and masonry. The property is enclosed by a dark fence, enhancing privacy and delineating the lot.
description: A large, gabled-roof suburban house with a double garage, landscaped yard, and fenced perimeter. Features include a covered entry porch, numerous large windows, and a backyard patio with a pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entryway with covered porch, and driveway with two parked cars.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the garage, side windows, and dense landscaping along the fence.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio, pool, large windows, and a more private garden area.
description_view_3: Right side view with additional windows, balcony, and a clear view of the fenced yard and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: mixed symmetrical and asymmetrical rows with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with steps, single main door, flanked by windows and decorative columns
